description: A square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' rogues-gallery template. Background is the standard desaturated black-and-white macro photo of handcuffed hands against a dark body, used generically rather than depicting the named person. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'DALLAS' in white serif caps. Top-left cyan bold sans-serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL'; white sub-line '2/10/2025 | Dallas, TX.' The arrestee's name is in large white bold sans-serif: 'Juan Ramos-Alozo.' Below, white 'CRIME:' label and bulleted charge 'Lewd/lascivious child abuse.' DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark at bottom left; red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right. The piece follows a fixed agency layout (red/white/black plus cyan accent) that combines an anonymized handcuffs stock image with a named individual and an emphasized child-abuse charge as a propaganda device to cast immigrant detainees as 'the worst' offenders and legitimize deportation. Aimed at the general public and supporters of immigration enforcement.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Dallas, TX; Juan Ramos-Alozo; CRIME: Lewd/lascivious child abuse; DALLAS; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
